message:
feat(utils.heaps,classes.function): BinaryHeap/MinHeap/PairingHeap + frozen (br-r37-c1-9yavb)

Four utility surfaces previously not exposed by franken_networkx:

- BinaryHeap, MinHeap, PairingHeap (re-exported from networkx.utils.heaps)
  Used as default heap= kwarg in stoer_wagner and other algorithms.
- frozen(*args, **kwargs) (from networkx.classes.function)
  Sentinel that raises NetworkXError; attached to frozen graphs by nx.freeze.

Verified BinaryHeap insert/min/pop, PairingHeap insert/min, MinHeap is the
same class as nx (abstract base), and frozen() raises 'Frozen graph can't
be modified' as expected.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -7071,6 +7071,22 @@ def no_filter(*items):
     return nx.classes.filters.no_filter(*items)
 
 
+# Heap classes (networkx.utils.heaps) — used as default heap= kwarg by
+# algorithms like stoer_wagner. Re-exported directly from nx.
+from networkx.utils.heaps import (  # noqa: E402
+    BinaryHeap,
+    MinHeap,
+    PairingHeap,
+)
+
+
+def frozen(*args, **kwargs):
+    """No-op sentinel raised by methods on a frozen graph."""
+    import networkx as nx
+
+    return nx.classes.function.frozen(*args, **kwargs)
+
+
 def _ancestors_descendants_missing_node_msg(G, source):
     kind = "digraph" if G.is_directed() else "graph"
     return f"The node {source} is not in the {kind}."
@@ -32128,6 +32144,10 @@ def directed_havel_hakimi_graph(in_deg_sequence, out_deg_sequence, create_using=
     "show_multiedges",
     "show_multidiedges",
     "no_filter",
+    "BinaryHeap",
+    "MinHeap",
+    "PairingHeap",
+    "frozen",
     "lexicographic_topological_sort",
     "topological_sort",
     "topological_generations",
